source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the image, an infinitely long straight current-carrying wire and a current-carrying equilateral triangular loop lie in the same plane. If the long straight wire is fixed, the current-carrying triangular loop will:
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: Translate toward the long straight wire.
